name: Lemon Afternoon Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together cream cheese and Hellman's (R) real mayonnaise until smooth.
2. Gradually beat in sugar.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Add grated lemon rind and lemon juice (if using), then vanilla extract.
5. Pour mixture into prepared Graham cracker pie crust on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
7. Chill for 4 hours.
